introSection: DarKoaster is a steel launched motorbike enclosed roller coaster at Busch Gardens Williamsburg in Williamsburg, Virginia, USA.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
The first pieces of track arrived in the summer of 2022.

In September 2022, Busch Gardens Williamsburg confirmed that DarKoaster would be added to the park. It uses the same building that formerly contained Curse of DarKastle.

DarKoaster opened on May 19, 2023.

fullText:
DarKoaster is a steel launched motorbike enclosed roller coaster at Busch Gardens Williamsburg in Williamsburg, Virginia, USA.

The first pieces of track arrived in the summer of 2022.

In September 2022, Busch Gardens Williamsburg confirmed that DarKoaster would be added to the park. It uses the same building that formerly contained Curse of DarKastle.

DarKoaster opened on May 19, 2023.
